explicit_change_request: AUQ DECISION-1001: Promote to a GOV spec (Recommended)
full_content:
# DCL-MAJOR-RELEASE-CONTENT-GATE-001 - Major-Release Content Gate

**Status:** specified.
**Type:** design_constraint.
**Derived from:** GOV-MAJOR-RELEASE-CONTENT-GOAL-001.
**Authority:** machine-checkable assertions enforced at v1.0 release-candidate
gate time.

## Constraint

The v1.0 release-candidate gate (scripts/release_candidate_gate.py or its
successor) MUST verify ALL FOUR assertions below and FAIL the cut if any
asserts incomplete. The assertions are content-completeness checks; they do
NOT introduce a calendar deadline (per DELIB-2234 quality-driven posture).

## Machine-Checkable Assertions

### Assertion 1 - Envelope-Program-Complete

Every release-content work item in the WI-4291..WI-4302 set MUST be resolved
or VERIFIED before a v1.0 cut. Enumeration (hardcoded to prevent vacuous pass
on partial or empty project-membership snapshots, per Codex review note F2 on
bridge/gtkb-major-release-content-goal-gov-002.md):

- WI-4291 - init-keyword formalization
- WI-4292 - wrap-keyword formalization
- WI-4293 - envelope-state durability
- WI-4294 - wrap procedure + lean tiering
- WI-4295 - topic-envelope router + per-type preload + unified vocabulary
- WI-4296 - rule-driven dispatcher (dispatch envelopes to harness / role /
  topic / arbitrary prompt; S308 activity gate)
- WI-4297 - project-completion dispatch payload
- WI-4298 - open / close disclosure UI
- WI-4299 - handoff-prompt service
- WI-4300 - glossary + GOV-SESSION-LIFECYCLE amendment
- WI-4301 - implementation
- WI-4302 - meta-model ADR

Transparency note: PROJECT-GTKB-ENVELOPE-OPEN-CLOSE-ACTION-REFINEMENT live
membership at constraint-creation time (2026-06-04) also includes WI-3467,
WI-3468, and WI-4286 from earlier meta-model work. Those three are NOT in
the v1.0 release-content gate scope per DELIB-20260638 (the standing goal
explicitly scopes to the WI-4291..WI-4302 set). The gate is bounded by the
hardcoded enumeration above; live project membership is informational only.

### Assertion 2 - Machinery-Present

DELIB-2234 release-machinery components MUST be complete:

- WI-3401 - mechanical-enforcement gate (Hybrid Variant prereq).
- WI-3402 - spec-corpus distillation (in-tree specs/ initially).
- WI-3403 - Docker isolation-validator (release-gate validator).
- DELIB-2234 acceptance criteria definition.

### Assertion 3 - Agent-Red-Gate

WI-3248 (P0 Agent Red deployability and maintainability preservation gate) in
PROJECT-AGENT-RED-RELEASE-READINESS MUST be green-on-clean.

### Assertion 4 - Gate-Binding

The release-candidate gate (scripts/release_candidate_gate.py or its
successor) MUST consume Assertions 1, 2, and 3 and refuse a v1.0 cut while
any assertion is incomplete. Gate-binding implementation is follow-on Phase 1
machinery work (this DCL captures the contract; consumption code is separate
WI scope).

## Posture

Quality-driven; no calendar deadline. The gate fail-closes by default until
all four assertions are satisfied.

## Lineage

- GOV-MAJOR-RELEASE-CONTENT-GOAL-001 - the governance goal this DCL enforces.
- DELIB-2234 - GT-KB v1.0 release strategy (release machinery and Agent Red
  gate).
- DELIB-20260638 - the standing content goal owner_decision.
- Codex GO at bridge/gtkb-major-release-content-goal-gov-002.md (non-blocking
  note F2: enumerate WI IDs explicitly to prevent vacuous pass on empty
  project-membership query).
